name: Shredded Beef with Sesame Seeds
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
1 ts Dark soy sauce
1 ts Chinese black rice vinegar (=OR= cider vinegar)
1/2 ts Sesame oil
1 ts Sugar
2 ts Rice wine or dry sherry
1/2 ts Roasted Sichuan peppercorns (optional)
2 ts Finely chopped scallions
1. Cut the steak into fine strips, about 3 inches long.
2. Combine the steak with egg white, salt, and cornstarch. Chill for about 20 minutes.
3. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet until moderately hot.
4. Add beef mixture to the hot oil and stir-fry quickly to prevent sticking.
5. Cook until the beef turns white (about 1 minute).
6. Drain beef immediately on a colander or sieve, removing excess oil.
7. Clean the wok and add about 1 tablespoon of the drained oil.
8. Reheat in the wok until hot.
9. Add sesame seeds and stir-fry for 1 minute or until slightly browned.
10. Add sauce ingredients to the pan and bring to a boil.
11. Return cooked beef to the pan and stir-fry for another 2 minutes, ensuring even coating with the sauce and sesame seeds.
12. Serve immediately or at room temperature.
